Class VirtualView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Server.View.VirtualView
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameView, PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class VirtualView extends Object implements GameView, PropertyChangeListener
Acts as the server-side proxy representing a remote client's view.

This class implements the Observer pattern by listening to state changes emitted by the central Game model. When a change is detected, the VirtualView formats the new state into a SerializedUpdate and pushes it over the network via the client's output stream.

      public VirtualView(PrintWriter out)
      Constructs a new VirtualView bounded to a client's output stream.

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      Invoked automatically when the observed Game model broadcasts a state change.
      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface PropertyChangeListener

      Parameters:

    • updateGameStatus

      public void updateGameStatus(String status)
      Broadcasts a newly captured game state to the client.
      Specified by:
      updateGameStatus in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      status - The serialized representation of the current game state.

    • askNickname

      public void askNickname()
      Initiates the login handshake by requesting a nickname from the client.
      Specified by:
      askNickname in interface GameView

    • showLoginResult

      public void showLoginResult(boolean success, String reason)
      Informs the client of the outcome of their login request.
      Specified by:
      showLoginResult in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      success - true if the nickname was accepted, false if rejected.
      reason - A descriptive message detailing the outcome.
